name: Spanakopeta (Spinach Pie)
recipeIngredient: 3 packages spinach (frozen, chopped); (10 oz each) thawed and pressed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute scallions in 2 tablespoons melted butter.
2. Combine with eggs, spinach, and cheese.
3. Place 8 pastry sheets, each brushed with melted butter, in a greased 13x9x2-inch pan.
4. Place spinach mixture evenly over pastry sheets.
5. Top with remaining pastry sheets, ensuring the top sheet is well buttered.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
7. Cut into squares or diamond shapes.
8. Serve hot. Spanakopeta freezes well.
